titleStmt.title: SII 22.241: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 241. (A.R. No. 241 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, CHEYYAR TALUK, TIRUPPANAṄGĀḌU. ŚIVA TEMPLE—ON THE WEST AND SOUTH WALLS OF THE MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE TĀḶAPURĪŚVARA SHRINE. VIRŪPĀKSHA II, SON OF HARIHARA II—Śaka 1303 (wrong for 1304).

summary.p: This inscription is dated in Dundubhi, Makara, śu. 5, Friday, Rēvati corresponding to A.D. 1383, January 9. This registers the sale of some specified houses and house-sites situated in three streets of the tirumaḍaiviḷāgam belonging to the temple of Tiruppanaṅgāvuḍaiya-Nayanār at Brahmadēśappaṟṟu in Kaḻumala-nāḍu, a division of Kāliyūrkōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻamaṇḍalam, to certain Kaikkōḷas, Kaikkōḷa-mudalis and dēvaraḍiyār for 150 paṇam, so as to meet the demand of śūla-vari (from the king) when the local tank had breached, and the temple had no other resources to pay the tax. Mention is made of a street Vaśavaṇaṉ-tiruvīdi and of a house belonging to one Adiruṅkaḻal-Perumāḷ Toṇḍaimāṉār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śrīman mahāmaṇṭaliśvaran Ariyaṇa Uṭaiyar kumāra viruppaṇa Uṭaiyarkku cellāniṉṟa śakāptam Āyirattumuṉṉūṟṟumuṉṟukku mel cellāniṉṟa tuntupi samvaṟsarattu makaranāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu pañcamiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa revati nāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattuk kāliyūr koṭṭattuk kaḻumala nāṭṭup piramatecappaṟṟu tiruppaṉaṅkāṭṭu Āḷuṭaiyār
tiruppaṉaṅkāvuṭaiya nāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇi tiruppaṉaṅkāṭu kaiyk koḷaṟkkum kaiykkoḷamutalikaḷukkum tevaraṭiyāṟkum taṇṭecuravilaiyāka viṟṟa tirunāmattukkāṇi tirumaṭaiviḷākattil teṟkut tiruvācalukku teṟku caṉṉatit teru tevar Aṭiyār maṉaikiḻciṟaku kalnāṭṭukku vaṭakkumaṉaiyum maṉaippaṭappaiyum melciṟaku melaittirumatiḷ teṟkukkoṭikku cevvai vacavaṇaṉ tiruvitiyile Uṟa maṉaiyum
maṉaippaṭappaiyum teṟku vacavaṇaṉ tiruviti teṉciṟaku Uvaccar maṉai Iraṇṭum niṅkal Āka Itukku meṟku melaittiruvitiyil kiḻciṟakil koṭiyil cevvaikku kiḻakku maṉaiyum kalṉāṭṭu cevvai maṉaippaṭappaiyum vaṭaciṟaku melait tiruvitiyil kiḻciṟakukku kiḻakku caṉṉatit teruvile Uṟa maṉaiyum kalṉāṭṭu cevvai maṉaiyump paṭappaiyum vaṭakkut tiruvācalukku kiḻakku māheśvara maṭattukkut teṟku tirumatiḷile Uṟa maṉai Iraṇṭum maṉaippaṭappaiyum Itukku meṟku vaṭakkut tiruviti vaṭaciṟaku melaittiru
vitikku kiḻakku maṉaiyum maṉaippaṭappaiyum teṉciṟaku Atiruṅkaḻal perumāḷ toṇṭaimāṉār maṉaiyum maṉaippaṭappaiyum Uṭpaṭa Itukku meṟku melaittiruvitiyile Uṟa maṉaiyum maṉaipaṭappaiyum Ākat teru muṉṟum caṇṭecura vilaiyāka niṟcayitta � 100 5 10 Ippaṇam nūṟṟu Aiympatum Ivvūril caṭaieri matakile Uṭain(t)tu pokaiyil cūlavarikku mutal Illātapaṭiāle Inta teru muṉṟum kāṇiāṭciāka kaikkoḷar kaiykkoḷamutalikaḷ
ḷum tevaraṭiyārkkum viṟṟu Ippaṇam nūṟṟuaiympatum vāṅki kuṭut tom Itteru muṉṟiṉāl Uḷḷa maṉaiyum maṉaippaṭappaiyum Ivarkaḷukku viṟṟoṟṟi pratikreyatāya tāṉaṅkaḷukkum Urittāvatākavum Ippaṭikku viṟṟu vilaip piṟamāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Ikkoyilil māheśvararum tāṉattārom Ippaṭikku Ivai Āṇṭaperumāḷ tirucciṟṟampalapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai cirāḻvāṉ tillaikkūttapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai koyil kaṇakku piramātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ikkoyil poṟkoyil Ācāri Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 22.241 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
